prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 67、56、65、47、58 名，整体在 47–67 名区间波动，2025 年基准约 58 名。近 3 年（2023–2025）位次分别为 65→47→58，2024 年曾冲至 47 名高位后 2025 年小幅回落，整体呈高位震荡格局；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021–2024 年均为 22 人，2025 年增至 25 人，2026 年进一步扩至 30 人，较 2025 年扩招 20%，招生名额显著增加，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为 985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第 2 名（Top 2），属全国顶尖学府，办学层次极高；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情；但抖音综合热度排名全国第 3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨。2025 年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次出现空档），但属个别省份现象，对辽宁影响有限；北京大学 A- 及以上学科超 40 个，代表性学科包括数学 A+、物理学 A+、计算机科学与技术 A+、电子科学与技术 A+、法学 A+、中国语言文学 A+ 等，学科实力覆盖文理医工，与物理类试验班（数学类、物理学类、计算机类、电子信息类等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度为高热推荐，数学/统计为推荐，整体工科热度较高；辽宁省 2026 年物理类考生约 14.3 万人（按历史比例估算），较 2025 年（14.34 万）基本持平；北京大学位于北京（非本省），辽宁省属邻省，无显著地域偏好偏差；该校在辽宁招生计划近年持续增加，2026 年物理类 30 人，属外省招生规模较大的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位震荡格局（47–67 名）、2026 年大幅扩招 20%（从 25 人增至 30 人，竞争缓解）、学校顶尖层次与高热抖音关注度（报考热度不减），以及声誉偏负面带来的有限抑制，在 2025 年基准 58 名基础上。预测最低位次约65名，区间55–75名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（元培）（数学类、物理学类、天文学、地球物理学类、心理学类、计算机类、电子信息类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（物理组相关专业）（数学类等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（理科基础类专业）（数学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京大学在辽宁省物理类仅设试验班大类招生，实际分档主要取决于入校后的专业分流。位次在预测区间（55–75 名）内建议积极报考，位次优于区间下限（55 名以内）可重点争取元培学院等高端培养项目；位次接近区间上限（75 名左右）仍有机会录取，但需做好专业分流竞争准备。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 67, 56, 65, 47, and 58, fluctuating within the range of 47–67, with a baseline of about 58 in 2025. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings were 65→47→58, peaking at 47 in 2024 before slightly declining in 2025, showing a high-level volatile pattern. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category: 22 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 25 in 2025, and further expanding to 30 in 2026, a 20% increase compared to 2025. The significant increase in enrollment slots helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd (Top 2) in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier national institution with an extremely high academic level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, dormitory, and cafeteria issues. However, its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 3rd nationally (high heat), with massive short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. In 2025, an abnormal signal of high attention appeared (a vacancy in the early batch of Hubei Province), but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Liaoning. Peking University has over 40 disciplines rated A- or above, including representative disciplines such as Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Law A+, and Chinese Language and Literature A+. Its academic strength covers liberal arts, sciences, medicine, and engineering, highly matching the Physics Category experimental classes (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity and are highly recommended, while Mathematics/Statistics are recommended, with overall high engineering popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning Province is approximately 143,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), roughly the same as in 2025 (143,400). Peking University is located in Beijing (not within the province), and Liaoning is a neighboring province, with no significant regional preference bias. The university's enrollment plan in Liaoning has been increasing in recent years, with 30 students in Physics Category in 2026, making it one of the provinces with a larger enrollment scale from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high-level volatile pattern of historical rankings (47–67), the significant 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 25 to 30 students, easing competition), the top-tier university level and high Douyin attention (sustained application heat), and the limited suppression from negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 58, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 65, with a range of 55–75.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Mathematics, Physics, Astronomy, Geophysics, Psychology, Computer Science, Electronic Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics-related Majors) (Mathematics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Basic Science Majors) (Mathematics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Peking University only enrolls through experimental class categories for Physics Category in Liaoning Province, so the actual tier division mainly depends on major selection after enrollment. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (55–75) are advised to actively apply. Those with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 55) can focus on high-end programs like Yuanpei College. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 75) still have a chance of admission but should be prepared for competition in major selection.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 28, 34, 26, 28, and 27, fluctuating narrowly within the 26–34 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 27. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings were 26→28→27, showing extreme stability with no clear upward or downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province has been 22 students each year from 2021 to 2026, remaining unchanged for six consecutive years, with a stable enrollment scale and no additional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 2nd (Top 2) in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier national institution with an extremely high level of education. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving public opinion on campus safety, canteens, and dormitories. However, its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 3rd nationally (high heat), with massive short video exposure and continuously high application attention. In 2025, there was an abnormal signal of high attention (a first-time vacancy in Hubei's early batch), but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Liaoning. Peking University has over 40 A- or higher disciplines, including representative ones such as Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, and Journalism and Communication A-, which highly match the History Category experimental classes (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Economics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a state of differentiation and observation, Finance/Economics is in differentiation and observation, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is stable. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province is approximately 57,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase of about 1.2% from 2025 (56,300), with minimal change. Peking University is located in Beijing (not within the province), and Liaoning is a neighboring province with no significant regional preference bias. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning has been stable at 22 students for six consecutive years, making it a province with a moderate enrollment scale for out-of-province universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the extreme stability of historical rankings (narrow fluctuation within 26–34), the unchanged enrollment plan for six consecutive years, the top-tier university level and high Douyin attention, as well as the limited suppression from the slightly negative reputation, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 27, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24, with a range of 19–29.
